news.headline: Trump says he’s making final decision on Iran deal as Tehran slams ‘mixture of truth and lies’
news.summary: US President Donald Trump on Friday said he would be making a final decision on a potential deal to end the US-Israeli war against Iran ahead of a high-security meeting in the White House Situation Room. But after more than two hours of deliberations, no decision has yet been forthcoming.

news.headline: Canada sidelined in USMCA renegotiations as domestic economy dips
news.summary: Canada strengthens Chinese trade ties, seeking economic diversification amid growing US–Canada trade tensions

news.headline: Ex-US Attorney General Pam Bondi testifies in Epstein files probe
news.summary: Bondi, who was fired in April, defended the release of Epstein records in a closed-door congressional hearing.
